title: CapabilityPolicy
description: A typed capability authorization policy for execution forks, protocols, tools, and runtime primitives. This is the canonical allow/deny surface below which tool exposure policies may only reduce visibility, never widen authority.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

version.description: Semver version of this capability policy.

description.description: Optional explanation of what this policy governs.

appliesToTransport.description: Transports or invocation surfaces governed by this policy.

defaultEffect.description: Default decision when no grant matches.

tokenTtlSeconds.description: Optional default token TTL for grants resolved from this policy.

grants.description: Ordered grants evaluated against subjects, capabilities, and optional selectors.

subjectRefs.description: Explicit subjects, agents, services, or communities this grant applies to.

capabilityPrefixes.description: Capability prefixes matched by this grant, e.g. net.http or fs.read.

selectors.description: Optional workload, mission, repo, or trust-class selectors.

requireHumanApproval.description: Whether use of this grant requires explicit human approval.
